zh.lifeSummary: 當Experience Mitchell於大約1603年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德萊登時，他的父親Thomas Mitchell39歲，母親Margaret Williams33歲。他於1627年5月22日之後與Jane Cooke在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利且於1684年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。他去世於1689年5月14日之前在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯布利其沃特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Experience Mitchell于大约1603年出生在荷兰-拉藍德萊登时，他的父亲Thomas Mitchell39岁，母亲Margaret Williams33岁。他于1627年5月22日之后与Jane Cooke在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利且于1684年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。他去世于1689年5月14日之前在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯布利其沃特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。

nameMeanings.name: Mitchell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from the vernacular pronunciation in Middle English and Older Scots of the personal name   Michael  . See   Michelson  .
English and Scottish: nickname for a big man, from Middle English michel, mechel, muchel ‘big’.
Irish (County Connacht): surname adopted as equivalent of   Mulvihill  .

variants.name: Michell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Etienne, Yvrose.
English (Cornwall): variant of   Mitchell   and   Michel  .
German: variant of   Michel  . This surname is rare in Germany.

variants.name: Mutch
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire) and English (Lancashire and Cheshire): nickname for a large (tall or fat) person, from Middle English moche, muche ‘big’ (a shortened form of mochel, muchel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Muckle .

variants.name: Meikle
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Middle Scots mekill, meikill ‘big’. Compare Mitchell 2, Muckle , and Mutch .

variants.name: Mickle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’. Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Mutch .
Americanized form of German   Mickel   1 or of a homonymous Germanized Sorbian surname (see   Mickel   2).

variants.name: Michael
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Jewish, and Greek: from the personal name Michael, ultimately from Hebrew Mika’el ‘Who is like God?’. This was borne by an archangel in the Bible, the protector of Israel (Daniel 10:13, 12:1; Rev. 12:7). In Christian tradition, Michael was regarded as the warrior archangel, conqueror of Satan, and the personal name was correspondingly popular throughout Europe, especially in knightly and military families. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Mihály (see Mihaly ), Czech and Slovak Michal , Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Mikhael and Mikhail , and also patronymics and other derivatives from these names, e.g. Greek Papamichael , its cognate Papamichalis, and Michaelides , Serbian Mihajlović (see Mihajlovic ), and Slovenian Mihelčič (see Mihelcic ). Compare Mikeal .

variants.name: Mixell
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Mitchell  .

variants.name: Muckle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname for a big man, from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’ (Old English mycel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle and Mutch .
South German: from a diminutive of   Muck   ‘gnat’.

nameMeanings.name: Experience
meanings: Found as a female name in the Yarmouth parish records. It explains itself.

historicEvents.description: Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn was born in Leiden, the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: English Reformed Church is Opened
historicEvents.description: A Catholic church building had been confiscated during the reformation, then was closed by the city council during the 16th century. This same building was reopened in 1607 for English-speaking Protestants. It is now known as the English Reformed Church.

historicEvents.title: Athenaeum Illustre of Amsterdam
historicEvents.description: "The Amsterdamse Atheneum was an ""illustrous school"" sponsored by the city, where famous scientists such as Petrus Camper and Caspar Barlaeus taught classes. It was built from the remains of a 1470 chapel (Agnietenklooster). Upon being founded, the City Library was moved to the attics of the building and formed the beginning of what would become the University Library."
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

historicEvents.title: The First Anglo-Dutch War
historicEvents.description: Also referred to as the First Dutch War. This was an entirely sea-based conflict that arose by trade disputes between the United Provinces of the Netherlands against the Commonwealth of England. Ended with the Treaty of Westminster; Holland agreed to respect the Navigation Act and compensate England accordingly.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of War - First Anglo-Dutch War (1652-1654)

historicEvents.title: The Third Anglo-Dutch War
historicEvents.description: The Third Dutch War was another military conflict, fought between the Dutch Republic and the Kingdom of England. The conflict was provoked by France and England, but the Dutch attacked first during the battle of Sole Bay.  After increasing public opposition to the war in England, peace was made with the Treaty of Westminster.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of War - Third Anglo-Dutch War (1672-1674)

en.lifeSummary: When Experience Mitchell was born about 1603, in Leiden, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Thomas Mitchell, was 39 and his mother, Margaret Williams, was 33. He married Jane Cooke after 22 May 1627, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He lived in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1639 and Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1684. He died before 14 May 1689, in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, and was buried in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Experience Mitchellが約1603年にオランダズイド-hオランドレイデンで生まれた時，父Thomas Mitchellは39歳，母Margaret Williamsは33歳であった。1627年5月22日以後にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーでJane Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスダクスブリーに，1684年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスブリジェワターに住んでいた。彼は1689年5月14日以前にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスブリジェワターで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスブリジェワターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Experience Mitchell(이)가 대략 1603년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 레이든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Mitchell(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Williams(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1627년 5월 22일 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 Jane Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1639년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이에서, 1684년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 살았다. 그는 1689년 5월 14일 이전 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Experience Mitchell nasceu aproximadamente 1603, em Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Thomas Mitchell, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Williams, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Cooke após 22 de maio de 1627, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1639 e em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1684. Ele faleceu antes 14 de maio de 1689, em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, e foi sepultado em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Experience Mitchell родился около 1603 г. в местности лиден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Thomas Mitchell было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Williams, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Cooke после 22 май 1627 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности дуксбури, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году и в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1684 году. Он умер перед 14 май 1689 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты и был похоронен в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
